title: [ChromeOS Security] Multiple Share Memory TOCTOU Vulnerabilities in Qualcomm Snapdragon 7c Gen 2 Camera Drivers Which can be triggered from Chome Browser Context
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
Backgroud:  
  
My test chromebook is lenovo chromebook duet3, which is Qualcomm Snapdragon 7c Gen 2 Compute Platform according to Google result. The Kernel version is 5.4  
  
On duet3, the camera drivers are Qualcomm's camx:  
  
https://source.chromium.org/chrom
